title: official endpoint case: reasoning enabled json_object

messages.content: Return ONLY a minified JSON object with EXACTLY these keys and constraints: {"location":string, "temperature":integer [-100..100], "conditions":"sunny|cloudy|rainy|snowy", "unit":"celsius", "readings":[{t:integer, ts:ISO-8601 UTC Z} x 3]}. No code fences, no extra text, no newlines. Example shape only; fill realistic values for Boston.
